map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Don't think about the lore implications of this area, okay?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Hey, so I might be a little lost.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I've done it, I finally know how to breathe!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Ok, but don't run away this time!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Ok, but don't run away this time!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I refused to read signs for years and the avatar of sign smited me from existence.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I can't find my nose, *you* must have it, thief!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Today's episode is sponsored by the letter 3.
